text.title: Objection Bank Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of objection-bank.yaml and the monthly diff post. Both must validate before merge to the marketing repo.

forbidden.pattern: entry.evidence_quotes empty or with fewer than 2 verbatim quotes from real encounters
entry.canonical_counter_statement is a paraphrase of a competitor's stock answer (drop-in template language)
resolved_in = unanswered for a top-5 ranked entry that has been in the bank for > 30 days
entry.tag outside the closed vocabulary in 01-core-rules
monthly_diff posted to channel without the unanswered_list section (defeats the feedback loop)
entry created with encounter_count = 1 without a second corroborating quote — synthetic / single-anecdote noise

allowed-transformations.transformation: Cluster near-duplicate objections into one entry, preserving each verbatim quote in the evidence_quotes list (with its own date and source channel).
Anonymise prospect names in evidence_quotes when the prospect requested it; never anonymise the substance of the objection.
Trim counter_statement to its load-bearing sentence when used in a cold-DM reply; the canonical lives in YAML, the trimmed version in the reply.

list.item: Every entry has at least 2 verbatim evidence quotes
Top-5 entries all have resolved_in set to a real landing/faq location (none unanswered)
Tags drawn from the closed vocabulary
Monthly diff post includes the unanswered list
Canonical counter statements are 40-80 words and quarterly-reviewed
encounter_count and blocked_revenue_estimate align with the encounter logs they cite
